entity.summary: Self-custody decentralized spot and perpetual exchange providing live markets, order books, market and limit orders, positions, fills, account data, and programmatic trading through current mainnet interfaces.
entity.notes: The official Rubin GitHub organization publishes a current mainnet MCP server and documentation for perpetual and spot trading, live order books, account data, and order management. A current public mainnet indexer exposes perpetual markets, rolling volume, open interest, and oracle prices. No exact initial launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Rubin mainnet MCP server
evidence.notes: Official Rubin organization repository identifies Rubin as a self-custody decentralized perpetual and spot exchange and documents live markets, order books, account data, and current order-management tools.

evidence.title: Rubin mainnet perpetual markets indexer
evidence.notes: Current first-party mainnet API exposes perpetual-market records including rolling trading volume, open interest, and oracle-price fields used by the live exchange stack.
